title: Extra Large 30L 60 Can Insulated Hot/Cold Cooler Bag Cool Box Picnic Camping Food Drink Ice Freezer Cool with Carry Handle and Shoulder Strap
features: EXTRA LARGE: 30L of space equates to 60 coke cans and is plenty of space for foods and drinks for a family of 4

HOT/COLD INSULATED TECHNOLOGY: Great performance when used with or without cool blocks (lasts up to 9 hours when used with cool block), 4 Layer material hot/cold technology keeps items hot or cold by retaining the inner temperature
EASY TO CARRY: Shoulder strap and carry handle with palm support - you can carry this for a prolonged period without getting hand burns or shoulder pain
ALL-IN-ONE: Front pocket for easy access, portable and lightweight, great for picnics, barbecues, fishing and camping trips.
TECH STUFF: H30 x W45 x D29cm / H12" x W17" x D11" / 4 Layer material hot/cold technology keeps items hot or cold by retaining the inner temperature
description: Perfect for picnics / barbeques Description - A really good value Collapsible Cool bag - This is a large bag which can hold 60 standard size cans - Great performance when used with cool blocks or without - Protects food or drinks from Ambient heat - Easy wipe clean interior - Shoulder strap and Carry handle with Palm support - Front pocket with Velcro Fastening - Portable and lightweight - Great for picnics, barbecues, fishing and camping trips. Appx. size:- H30 x W45 x D29cm / H12" x W17" x D11"
